headline: DOJ SMACKS Walz & Frey рҹ‘®вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҚ‘ for Cucking ICE Gestapo Drama рҹ’Ҙрҹҡ”
text: US DOJ рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ”Ҙ dropping the HAMMER рҹ”Ё on Minnesota Dem SIMPS рҹҳ© Tim Walz рҹ§”рҹҮәрҹҮі & Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey рҹӨЎрҹҡ« for allegedly OBSTRUCTING рҹӣ‘ ICE DEPORTATION DADDIES рҹ‘®вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹӣӮ! Trump's admin рҹҚҠрҹ‘‘ CLASHING HARD рҹ’Ҙ with blue libs over spicy statements calling ICE 'MODERN-DAY GESTAPO' рҹҳұрҹ•¶пёҸ вҖ“ Walz whining on X рҹҡҖ 'Weaponizing justice is AUTHORITARIAN' рҹҳӮрҹӨЎ while dodging the REAL TEA вҳ•: ICE agent POPPED рҹ’Ҙрҹ”« Renee Good рҹ‘© 37yo legal observer рҹҡ— in Minneapolis last week, THREE CHEST BLASTS рҹҺҜрҹ’Ҙ + forearm & HEAD SHOT рҹӨ•рҹ©ё! Paramedics found her UNRESPONSIVE рҹҳө no pulse рҹ’Җ in the AMBULANCE рҹҡ‘ en route вҖ“ WALZ salty AF 'Why no probe on the SHOOTER?' рҹ‘Җрҹ”Қ but Trump crew says she tried to ROADKILL the agent рҹӣ»рҹ’Ё who got INTERNAL BLEEDING рҹҳ©рҹ©ё from her Honda Pilot lunge! Video GOOFY AF рҹ“№рҹҳӮ: Car BLOCKING traffic рҹҡ—рҹӣ‘, ICE bros YELL 'GET OUT' рҹ“ў, she PEELS OUT рҹҸҺпёҸрҹ’Ё agent DRAWS & BLASTS рҹ”«рҹ’Ҙ then strolls off like BOSS рҹҳҺрҹҡ¶вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ! Protests RAGING рҹ”ҘрҹӘ§ in Mpls over holiday weekend, Dems like Ilhan OMAR рҹ‘©вҖҚрҹҰ°рҹҮёрҹҮҙ screaming ICE 'PROVOKING CHAOS' рҹҳЎрҹҢӘпёҸ, Adriano Espaillat рҹ—Ҫ calling 'em DEADLY WEAPON вҡ”пёҸрҹ’Җ, Pramila Jayapal рҹҷ…вҖҚвҷҖпёҸ demanding NO MASKS рҹҳ·рҹҡ«, WARRANTS рҹ“ң & BODY CAMS рҹ“№ for deport squads! Dem lawmakers рҹҡ—рҹ’Ё to city for HEARING рҹҺӨрҹӨ¬ grilling residents SHACKLED вӣ“пёҸ hours proving citizenship рҹҶ” вҖ“ DHS babe Tricia McLaughlin рҹ’… clapping back 'Reasonable suspicion = ID check, NO RACISM HERE' рҹҷҢвңӢ! Frey flexing 'Won't be INTIMIDATED' рҹҳӨрҹӣЎпёҸ for backing local cops vs Trump's STREET CHAOS рҹҡ”рҹ’Ҙ, but inquiry under 18 USC В§372 рҹ‘®вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ“ң hits 'em for CONSPIRING рҹ’ҖрҹӨқ to INTIMIDATE federal ops thru THREATS рҹҳ рҹ“ў! Trump GOD рҹ‘‘рҹҚҠ BLASTS on Truth Social рҹ“ұ 'Protesters are PAID PROS' рҹӨЎрҹ’°, Walz/Frey LOST CONTROL рҹҳөвҖҚрҹ’« вҖ“ no Insurrection Act YET рҹ’Әрҹҡ« but THOUSANDS ICE WARRIORS рҹӣЎпёҸрҹ‘®вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ deployed in MN! FBI probing shooting рҹ”Қрҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ but NO civil rights dive on agent рҹҷ…вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ, locals SHUT OUT рҹҡӘвқҢ. Walz urges PEACEFUL protests вҳ®пёҸрҹ•ҠпёҸ but Trump simps say his RHETORIC lit the FUSE рҹ§Ё вҖ“ DEM ORGY рҹ‘ҜвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ of FEARMONGERING vs ICE BRRRRR deport machine рҹӣӮрҹҡҖ going FULL THROTTLE рҹҳ©рҹ’Ё! Who's the REAL CUCK рҹҗ” here, Walz dodging fed heat while Renee shooting vid DROPS BOMBS рҹ’Јрҹ“№? Minnesota MELTDOWN рҹҚҰрҹ’Ҙ incoming! рҹ”ҘрҹҳӮ
